meaning: ladj.(爱琴海中)得洛斯岛(Delos)的lln.得洛斯人
examples: The simulation results on a far going experimental ship named 'yulong 'of Delian Maritime University show that the designed methods to be proposed is very effective.
In Chapter one I illustrate some issues on the continuing war of the Delian League against Persia, including its influence upon the international pattern among the Greek city-states.
